# Cybercon Solutions

> Managed IT, cybersecurity, cloud, and AI for South Florida businesses.
> We work proactively, and security is the default.

## Site

- Homepage: https://cybercon-solutions.com/
- Spanish: https://cybercon-solutions.com/es/
- Privacy: https://cybercon-solutions.com/privacy/
- Search: https://cybercon-solutions.com/search/
- Client area: https://cybercon-solutions.com/client/

## Services

- Managed IT Services
- Cybersecurity & Compliance (HIPAA, SOC 2, PCI DSS, GLBA)
- Cloud Services & Architecture (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Entra ID)
- IT Consulting & Virtual CIO
- Backup & Disaster Recovery
- Structured Cabling & Communications
- AI Consulting, Integration, and Conversational AI
- Web Design & Development

## Contact

- Email: info@cybercon-solutions.com
- Phone: 973-573-0007
- Service area: Cooper City & Davie, Florida
- Legal: Cybercon Solutions LLC, 407 Lincoln Rd. Suite 6H PMB 7209, Miami Beach, FL 33139

## Agent discovery

- Full text map: https://cybercon-solutions.com/llms-full.txt
- API catalog: https://cybercon-solutions.com/.well-known/api-catalog
- Auth for agents: https://cybercon-solutions.com/auth.md
- MCP server card: https://cybercon-solutions.com/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json
- OpenAPI: https://cybercon-solutions.com/openapi.json
- Sitemap: https://cybercon-solutions.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Markdown: request any page with `Accept: text/markdown`

## Optional

- DNS-AID: publish SVCB/HTTPS at `_index._agents.cybercon-solutions.com` pointing to this host (Cloudflare DNS)
